metadata.title: Govt Hajj 2026 | Hajj Policy 2026 | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank’s Labbaik Team facilitate Muslims to perform Hajj from first point to the last. Pakistani citizens who plan to undertake pilgrimage can now apply for Govt Hajj 2026.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login Labbaik Travel Asaan Govt Hajj Scheme 2026 If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print GOVT HAJJ SCHEME 2026 Basic Regular Package is from Rs. 1,150,000 to Rs. 1,250,000 Regular Hajj Scheme Long package: 38 to 42 days Regular Hajj Scheme Short package: 25 to 30 days First Instalment To be submitted with the application form Rs. 500,000 Rs. 550,000 Long & Short Package (for 4 to 6 bed sharing/full room) Second To be submitted by November 03 to 15, 2025 Rs. 650,000 Optional facilities (Subject to availability - only for Makkah Mukarramah) (Below mentioned facilities will be charged on second installment) Room Type Regular PKR Double Bed (Only for families with two members) Rs. 200,000 (per person) Triple for families with three members) Rs. 67,000 (per person) Note: Qurbani is not optional and is included in the basic package according to KSA Government instruction. From August 11, 2025, both registered and unregistered applicants can apply for Hajj 2026 until the quota is filled. Biometric Verification This is to inform you that biometric verification for Hajj 2026 is mandatory and must be completed by 17th February 2026 through either of the following options: SAUDI VISA BIO APP (Mobile App) For iOS Users: Download App For Android Users (Play Store): Download App TASHEER CENTER (Physical Visit) As a last option, biometric can be completed at Tasheer Centers as per Ministry instructions. Time : Monday to Friday, 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM Pilgrims must carry : ✅ Original Passport ✅ CNIC ✅ Computerized / Photo Hajj Receipt NO EXTENSION will be granted. As per MoRA instructions, failure to complete biometric verification will result in ineligibility for Hajj 2026 . Terms and Conditions - Second Installment Collection Submit your Hajj dues to your respective bank and obtain a computerized receipt. Pilgrims who have made online payments should continue using the online portal as usual. It will not be possible to change the selected Hajj package later; therefore, choose your package carefully when submitting the second installment. When submitting the second installment, the bank may correct your data and change the package only from short to long. To change from a long to a short package, a request must be sent to the Ministry through the bank. This will only be processed subject to availability. Before the second installment, you may make any corrections to your data at your respective bank branch. For grouping issues or correction of identity card numbers, a written request must be submitted to the relevant Hajj Officer In-Charge (IT Cell) of the Ministry. If the second installment is not submitted on time, the Hajj application will be considered canceled. In case of cancellation of Hajj admission at any stage, the Ministry is authorized to make deductions in accordance with the applicable regulations. The remaining amount of canceled applications will be refunded to the applicant’s respective bank account. Hajj pilgrims are advised to use the 2026 Pak Hajj Mobile App for effective communication with the Ministry. Applicants Age Applicants born before March 1, 2014, shall be considered for Hajj applications. Aged Persons (80 years and above) and disabled persons should be accompanied by a HELPER Eligibility Mehram's age should be 13 years or above. Females cannot apply for Govt. hajj Scheme without Sharee Mehram, only Fiqh Jafaria females of age 45 yrs & above can travel without a mehram. However, females of any age are ELIGIBLE to go for Hajj without mehram, but in a group of females, Afidavit required (as per decision of Islamic Nazaryati Counsel: 6 -7 June 2023 section 232). Group Leader must be an Adult Male or Female Group size must not exceed 10 applicants Group members must belong to the same Fiqh, either Shia or Sunni. Hardship, Labour Quota, Refund & Substitution Hardship Quota - For individuals who missed the opportunity to apply in govt hajj, addition of mehram / helper etc. A request letter is required for MoRA approval. Labour Quota - Special quota reserved for low paid employees, sponsored by their employer in private or public sector - Click here Refund Only - For applicant requesting refund of their hajj payment Click here Refund & Substitution - Hajj applicant substitution is only allowed if application refund is requested after deposit of all instalments - Click here Documents Required Valid CNIC Copy Three Photographs 4.5x3.5 Centimeter with white background should be obtained without glasses. (Polaroid and scanned photos are not allowed) In case of women, wearing Scarf is mandatory i.e. head, neck and ears covered. A token of the new passport or a copy of the International Machine Readable Passport (IMRP) must be submitted at the branch. The passport validity should not be less than November 26, 2026 Next of Kin / Nominee CNIC copy & contact number (should not be going on Hajj) COVID-19 vaccine is mandatory for individuals aged 65 years and above. Those below 65 are exempt. For further details please contact your nearest branch or Meezan Labbaik Team Downloads Iqrar Nama Data Collection Form Instructions Medical Form Affidavit without Mahram Meezan Labbaik Team Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Would you like more information? Fill in your details through this online form and our representatives will get in touch with you. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
